options.content:
### Live API Infrastructure Traffic This dashboard monitors all HTTP requests passing through the VulcanPaaS API Gateway, scraped in real-time by **Prometheus**.
#### 🔵 GET /api/deployments **Background Polling**: This represents standard dashboard traffic. The React frontend constantly polls this endpoint to update the UI state. Steady, low-level spikes here indicate active users viewing the dashboard metrics in real-time. #### 🟢 POST /webhook/github **Deployment Automation**: This endpoint spikes the exact moment a developer pushes code to their repository. A spike here means the webhook successfully reached VulcanPaaS, successfully triggering the **DeepSeek AI review engine** and the CI/CD pipeline. #### 🟣 POST /.../rollback **Version Control Tracker**: A spike here shows that an automated fallback (or manual rollback via the dashboard) was executed to quickly restore a previously stable container state. #### 🔴 Any 5xx Status Code **System Alerts / Error Tracking**: Any traffic here is highly critical. It tracks active server crashes, unhandled exceptions during the build phase, or infrastructure-level failures within isolated user Docker containers.
